knownPatterns.symptom: Outbox backlog grows; processor logs capture failures; no rows marked errored
knownPatterns.rootCause: Payload capture failing under PayloadCapture:ServiceBusFailureMode=FailClosed pauses the batch by design so no event is published without a durable audit record
knownPatterns.defaultAction: Restore the archive store; the processor resumes on its next poll. No replay needed - rows were never errored. If rows errored for other reasons during the outage, run: dotnet run --project src/StarterApp.DbMigrator -- replay-outbox --all-errored

verification.description: Confirms the backlog is paused-unprocessed (error IS NULL), not errored
verification.query: SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE error IS NULL) AS pending, count(*) FILTER (WHERE error IS NOT NULL) AS errored FROM outbox_messages WHERE processed_on_utc IS NULL

verificationTemplates.description: Lists errored outbox rows with their error text, retry and replay history
verificationTemplates.query: SELECT id, type, correlation_id, occurred_on_utc, retry_count, replay_count, replayed_on_utc, error FROM outbox_messages WHERE error IS NOT NULL AND processed_on_utc IS NULL ORDER BY occurred_on_utc

verificationTemplates.description: Shows rows that have been operator-replayed and whether they subsequently processed
verificationTemplates.query: SELECT id, type, replay_count, replayed_on_utc, processed_on_utc, error FROM outbox_messages WHERE replay_count > 0 ORDER BY replayed_on_utc DESC
